original_product.title: 240W USB-C Fast Charging Cable
original_product.description: High-power 240W USB-C to USB-C fast charging cable, 'Dopamine Design' style, for Apple devices.

specifications.materials: Silicone/TPE cable jacket, aluminum alloy connectors, copper wiring
specifications.other_specs: 240W Power Delivery, USB-C to USB-C, fast charging compatible

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A cute, stylized chibi dinosaur head, molded from soft-touch silicone in a vibrant pastel green, forms the housing of a USB-C connector. The cable, also pastel green silicone, extends from the dino's neck like a tail. The dino has small, friendly black eyes and a tiny smile. The other end is a matching pastel green USB-C connector. Studio shot on a clean white background.
design_alternatives.short_description: Adorable dinosaur-themed USB-C cable with soft silicone body, perfect for playful charging.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: Appeals to younger demographics and collectors of cute accessories. The silicone material is durable and pleasant to touch, enhancing the 'chubby' feel. High gifting potential.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A USB-C to USB-C data cable where one connector is shaped like a half-eaten chocolate chip cookie, molded from brown and beige silicone with textured 'chocolate chips'. The cable itself is a warm beige color, matching the cookie's dough. The other USB-C connector is a simple matching beige. The cookie end looks realistic but in a cartoon style. Studio shot on a clean white background.
design_alternatives.short_description: Deliciously designed cookie-themed USB-C cable, a sweet treat for your tech.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: Leverages the popular 'food aesthetic' trend and novelty appeal. The cookie shape is recognizable and charming, making it a unique and shareable e-commerce product. Simple silicone molding keeps manufacturing costs low.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A standard red silicone USB-C to USB-C cable, but it includes an integrated, flexible cable organizer shaped like a cartoon worm. The worm character is bright yellow with large, expressive googly eyes and a friendly smile, made of soft silicone. It's designed to wrap around the coiled cable for neat storage. Studio shot on a clean white background.
design_alternatives.short_description: Cable with a fun, flexible cartoon worm organizer for tangle-free storage.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: Adds a practical, fun element to cable management, solving a common user pain point with a playful twist. The integrated organizer is a unique selling proposition and enhances gifting appeal for organized individuals.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A sleek, black braided USB-C to USB-C cable. The housing of one USB-C connector is a simple black rectangular shape, but on its top surface, there are two small, circular, glowing white LED 'eyes' that resemble a simple emoji face. The eyes emit a soft, diffused white light when plugged in, giving the cable a subtle, friendly personality. The other connector is plain black. Studio shot on a clean white background.
design_alternatives.short_description: Subtle emoji-faced cable with glowing eyes, adding personality to your charge.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: Combines minimalist design with a subtle, interactive cartoon feature. The glowing eyes offer a unique visual cue for charging status and add a touch of personality without being overly childish, appealing to a broader demographic, including adults who appreciate subtle fun. LED integration is common and manufacturable.
